action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 crashed immediately with TypeError because normalize_images=False was passed to PPO instead of inside policy_kwargs. All other changes (8-frame stack, ent_coef=0.03, gamma=0.995, n_steps=8192, batch_size=1024, 30M steps) are sound. Analysis: Moving normalize_images into policy_kwargs fixes the crash. Additionally, replacing DummyVecEnv with SubprocVecEnv will parallelize the 10 training environments across the 24 CPU cores, cutting wall-clock time by several fold and allowing the 30M-step run to finish safely within the remaining ~7 hours. Decision: Update train.py only—fix the argument placement and switch to SubprocVecEnv—then launch the 30M-step training run.
